name: Le Van An
bio: 4+ years of experience in web development with Java Spring Boot and React, focusing on optimizing backend processes, enhancing UI/UX, and collaborating with cross-functional teams in product development.

companies.description: Managed devices and ownership vouchers for a Telecommunications product.
job: Collaborated with cross-functional teams to discuss and define OpenAPI specifications and database schema designs.
Worked closely with product owners and backend/frontend teams to refine API contracts and align on technical requirements.
Proposed UX improvements based on user behavior insights and implementation constraints to enhance overall product usability.
Implemented and maintained backend APIs following OpenAPI standards, and built UI components aligned with design specifications.

companies.description: Collaborated with clients across China, India, and Europe to deliver reliable web solutions.
job: Conducted code reviews, pair programming, mentored intern developers, and led tech sharing sessions to boost team knowledge and collaboration.
Enabled real-time backend communication for alerts and notifications via WebSocket.
Developed tasks such as cron jobs, XLSX, CSV and PDF report generation.
Developed a User Activity log visualization in AGGrid using Elasticsearch.
Developed reusable core UI components in a monorepo, configured with TailwindCSS and a Figma-based design system, significantly reducing development time.
Refactored and migrated legacy code from AngularJS to ReactJS using TypeScript in Microfrontend architecture.

companies.description: Collaborated with Europe clients to deliver high-quality web app solutions.
job: Mapped Figma design systems to React with Styled-components, ensuring consistent design and improved search visibility through QA checks.
Modified React Router to dynamically generate breadcrumbs, set page titles, and implement authentication guards for secure routing.
Customized React Query with advanced TypeScript to reduce boilerplate when working with APIs, enhancing code maintainability and developer efficiency.
Worked closely with design and testing teams to ensure seamless functionality and an optimal user experience.
Gained backend experience by contributing to small backend tasks, supporting the backend development alongside the team.

companies.description: Collaborated with the UX/UI team in Da Nang to stabilize production systems.
job: Resolved critical production issues, resulting in a 20% reduction in downtime and increased application stability.
Collaborated with the UX/UI team to optimize the user interface, leading to a 20% reduction in bounce rate and an overall improvement in user satisfaction.

projects.title: E-Commerce App
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack Web Store
role: Full-Stack Development: Developed a full-stack web app e-commerce store with product listing, cart management, and order processing.
Payment Integration: Integrated VNPay with Express.js to accept online payments.
Authentication: Implemented JWT to secure routes, enhance authentication, and improve user authorization.
description: A full-stack e-commerce web application built with Node.js and Express.js, featuring VNPay payment integration, product management, and secure user authentication.
achievements: Delivered a complete e-commerce solution including payments, authentication, and product management from scratch.

sides.title: E-Commerce App
sides.subtitle: Fullstack e-commerce with VNPay
description: A full-stack web app e-commerce store integrated with VNPay and ExpressJs to accept payments. Implemented JWT to secure routes, enhance authentication, and improve user authorization.
features: Payment Integration: Integrated VNPay with Express.js for online payment processing.
Secure Auth: Used JWT for authentication, authorization, and route protection.
sides.objective: Build a complete full-stack e-commerce store with online payment support and secure user authentication.
